chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 334 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1624/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.1535/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.1536/2025 (Ex.A) 5. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
